svg.text: test / demo / staging on IC mainnet - paths labeled P1-P6 for reference
Casals canister runs upgrade_to on orchestra (on IC)

g.text: Then P4 rollout -v latest (GH or local CLI)

svg.text: Runner builds WASM/frontend; upload to file_registry; authorize_wasm on Casals
pulls from file_registry, upgrades targets on IC
Realms + registry + installer + file_registry + marketplace + dashboard
realm_installer picks up job, tracks status
Skips: registry UI, installer, file_registry, marketplace, dashboard

g.text: CI or local CLI, local-mundus.yml, stages 0-3

svg.text: P1 casals-upgrade.yml - upgrade Casals orchestrator UI/backend (per env)
P2 deploy-files.yml + install - extension/codex bundles only
P3 release.yml - semver artifacts (GitHub + PyPI); deploy via P4 with -v latest
P4 publish-build.yml + rollout.yml - full orchestra via Casals (realms + infra)
P5 deploy-mundus.yml - fast off-chain realm deploy (3 realms, no infra)
P6 ci_install_mundus.py - full off-chain platform incl. infra (stages 0-3)
- mode=upgrade preserves state; reinstall wipes canisters
- publish-build is per environment AND per family
- deploy-files environment must match target env
P2: realms files build + publish + dfx canister call (~26s)
file_registry | Casals backend | realm_registry | realm_installer | realm targets
